system.notes: Standard-to-military sensor suites (audio/video, thermal, radar, ultrasound) with ID/recognition/tracking software; higher levels are restricted. Cost & weight by Level: L1 5,000¥/12 kg/SI 2, L2 15,000¥/25/SI 2.5, L3 25,000¥/35/SI 3, L4 50,000¥/50/SI 3.5, L5 75,000¥, L6 125,000¥, L7 375,000¥, L8 1.25M¥, L9 3M¥, L10 6M¥; Avail 4/7 days (L1) up to 18/1 year (L10); Base Time 16 hrs/level. Rigger 2 p.139–140.
